summary: Focused on personal and open-source projects including an n8n Telegram integration, a Windows file-tagging utility, automated profile card generation, and a Neovim IDE setup. Also built an image labeling tool and maintained a Clash proxy fork.

items.title: Profile card and CV generator
items.description: Developed an automated GitHub profile card and CV timeline generator.

items.title: Profile cards rendering
items.description: Worked on combining sidebar cards and CV timeline into a single profile SVG.

items.title: Clash proxy fork maintenance
items.description: Maintained a Clash proxy fork with XHTTP support for FlClash compatibility.

items.title: Telegram n8n node maintenance
items.description: Iterated on a Telegram integration node for n8n, adding triggers and stabilizing CI.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Refined a Windows Explorer file-tagging tool with version 2 features and store release.

items.title: Neovim development environment
items.description: Set up and maintained a personal Neovim configuration with LSP and treesitter support.

items.title: On-host image labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimal, fast YOLO image labeling tool for personal use.

items.title: n8n Telegram node improvements
items.description: Continued stability improvements on the Telegram n8n node.

items.title: intag metadata and store preparation
items.description: Extended file-tagging utility with extra metadata support and prepared for Microsoft Store submission.

items.title: Telegram n8n node development
items.description: Built initial version of a Telegram integration node for n8n with Docker and Alpine support.

items.title: Personal repository updates
items.description: Maintained personal repository with documentation updates.

items.title: Windows file-tagging tool early work
items.description: Started development of a Windows Explorer file-tagging utility with CLI capabilities.
